debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
refine IndepFun.of_identDistrib_right ?_
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) 1 (by simp) (by simp)
  · refine fun i ↦ identDistrib_rewardByCount h a i 1 (by simpa using i.2) (by simp)

refine IndepFun.of_identDistrib_right ?_
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) 1 (by simp) (by simp)
  · exact fun i ↦ identDistrib_rewardByCount h a i 1 (by cases i; simp) (by simp)

apply IndepFun.of_identDistrib_cond
  · exact measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  · exact measurable_pi fun i => measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i
  · intro s hs
    have : 𝔓'[s] = 0 ∨ 𝔓'[s] ≠ 0 := by apply Classical.em
    cases this with
    | inl h_zero => simp_all
    | inr h_nonzero =>
      have h_cond : 𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) | s; 𝔓'] = ν a := by
        have h_steps : ∃ t, s = (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {t} := by
          -- Since s is in the sigma-algebra generated by previous rewards,
          -- it is determined by stepsUntil values ≤ n.
          sorry
        cases h_steps with
        | intro t ht =>
          rw [ht]
          have h_t_finite : t ≠ ⊤ := by
            -- stepsUntil for (n+1) must be finite almost surely
            sorry
          cases t with
          | coe k =>
            exact reward_cond_stepsUntil h a (n + 1) k (by linarith) (by simpa [ht] using h_nonzero)
          | top => contradiction
      have h_marginal : 𝓛[rewardByCount A R a (n + 1); 𝔓'] = ν a :=
        (hasLaw_rewardByCount h a (n + 1) (by linarith)).map_eq.symm
      rw [h_cond, h_marginal]

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine indepFun_of_condIndepFun_of_indepFun _ _ _
  · exact condIndepFun_reward_stepsUntil_action h a (n + 1) (n + 1)
  · exact indepFun_fst_prod (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  · exact measurable_comap_pi_measurableSet_Iic hA hR a n

refine IndepFun.of_identDistrib_cond ?_
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) (by simp)
  · intro i
    exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a i (by cases i; simp)
  · intro i
    have : (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) =
        (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω) := rfl
    have : (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) =
        (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) := rfl
    exact condIndepFun_of_indepFun_right
      (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
        (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ·.1) a)
        (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1))
        (measurable_eval _ _))

apply IndepFun.comp_of_indepFun_left
  · exact measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  · exact fun _ ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a _
  · refine IndepFun.prod_right (fun i ↦ ?_)
    rw [Iic.mk_le_mk]
    exact identDistrib_indep_of_identDistrib
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) (by decide))
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (i : ℕ) (by rwa [Iic.coe_le_iff]))

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  refine indepFun_of_condIndepFun_left (by fun_prop) ?_
  intro i
  cases i with
  | mk k hk =>
    have hk' : k ≤ n := hk
    have h_indep : R k ⟂ᵢ[A k, hA k; P] fun ω ↦ IsAlgEnvSeq.hist A R (k - 1) ω :=
      IsAlgEnvSeq.condIndepFun_reward_hist_action h k
    have h_steps : stepsUntil A a (k + 1) =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (k + 1) ω := by rfl
    have h_reward_eq : rewardByCount A R a (k + 1) =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ R (stepsUntil A a (k + 1) ω.1) ω.1 := by
      exact ae_cond_of_forall_mem (measurableSet_univ) (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_def _ _ _ _)
    have h_future : rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ R (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ω.1 := by
      exact ae_cond_of_forall_mem (measurableSet_univ) (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount_def _ _ _ _)
    have h_cond_indep : CondIndepFun (mα.comap (fun ω ↦ A (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ω.1))
        ((hA (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1)).comp measurable_fst).comap_le
        (fun ω ↦ R (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) ω.1)
        (fun ω ↦ R (stepsUntil A a (k + 1) ω.1) ω.1) 𝔓' := by
      apply condIndepFun_fst_prod
      · exact measurable_comap_comp (measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (n + 1)) measurable_fst
      · exact measurable_comap_comp (measurable_rewardByCount hA hR a (k + 1)) measurable_fst
      · exact fun_prop
      · exact fun_prop
      · sorry
    exact h_cond_indep

refine indepFun_of_condIndepFun_right (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1))
    (measurable_pi fun i => measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i) ?_
  intro s hs
  obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Set.finite_Iic_iff.mp hs
  clear hs
  induction m with
  | zero => simp_all [Iic_zero]
  | succ m ih =>
    simp_all [Iic_succ, Finset.insert_eq, IndepFun.insert_right]
    exact ih

refine IndepFun.of_identDistrib_right ?_

    exact identDistrib_rewardByCount h a i 1 (by cases i; simp) (by simp)

intro ω
        funext i
        have h_i : ↑i ≤ n := by
          apply Nat.cast_le.mpr
          exact Iic.mem.mp i
        have h_lt : ↑i < t.1 := by
          apply lt_of_le_of_ne
          · exact Nat.cast_le.mpr (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le h_i))
          · intro h_eq
            rw [h_eq] at h_ω
            simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_ω
            have h_steps : stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1 = ↑t.1 := h_ω
            have h_steps' : stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1 ≥ ↑(n + 1) := by
              apply stepsUntil_ge
            linarith
        simp [h_lt, rewardByCount_of_stepsUntil_eq_coe (by simp)]
      rw [h_hist_det]
      clear h_hist_det
      exact indepFun.prod_mk_left (indepFun_fst_prod_right (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))

    · simp [h_nonzero]

apply IndepFun.of_identDistrib_cond
  · exact measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a (n + 1)
  · exact fun i ↦ measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R a i
  · intro s hs
    refine ae_of_all ?_
    intro t ht
    simp only [Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_univ, forall_true_left]
    have h1 := identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) (by linarith)
    have h2 := identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (Classical.choose ht) (by
      cases' Classical.choose_spec ht with k hk; subst hk; linarith)
    exact identDistrib.trans h1 h2.symm

refine IndepFun.of_identDistrib_cond _ _ ?_
  · exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) (by simp)
  · intro i
    exact identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a i (by simpa using i.2)
  · intro i
    have : (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω := by

    exact CondIndepFun.of_ae_eq_right (by fun_prop) this
